notes: The roll-3d world-space UI panel (M7 a12 exit content) — a diegetic info panel placed in the 3D arena on a curved (cylinder-section) render-to-texture surface (M7 a9 flat -> a10 curved, R-UI-003 / D4 / owner ruling (d)). The `panel` block is an ordinary headless `context_ui` tree (the a1/a2 surface — panel + a status label read-only data-bound to state + an action button covering the panel centre), laid out into the `surface` [w,h] the panel's dynamic texture is sized to; `world` places that surface on a cylinder-section mesh (integer-milli units so the corpus stays a canonical fixpoint). The m7-exit-3-worldpanel gate drives the LOGIC/interaction chain over this content: a screen pick ray -> ray-vs-mesh -> barycentric UV -> panel-space coords (a10 raycast_panel.h, broad-phase-pruned through spatial, IDENTICAL to the linear oracle) -> the SAME a3 UiInputRouter.route_pointer a flat panel uses (L-45) -> the ONE sim InputState sink. Pixels stay with the sibling render jobs (the ui-worldpanel / ui-curvedpanel SSIM goldens); this content + gate are the headless logic chain. UI is presentation (D6): the panel tree lives outside the sim World and never moves hash_world (the m7-exit-4 gate). Node `id`s are L-33 lowercase hex.
